memberdef.argsstring: ((packed))
memberdef.name: __attribute__

memberdef.argsstring: (sizeof(MagicHeader)==64, "MagicHeader must be 64 bytes")
memberdef.name: _Static_assert

memberdef.argsstring: (void)
memberdef.name: ck_model_create

detaileddescription.para: Create and allocate model memory. Returns opaque model pointer, or NULL on failure.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model, const int *token, int token_index)
memberdef.name: ck_model_decode

detaileddescription.para: Decode single token at position token_index. Used for autoregressive generation.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model, const int *tokens, int num_tokens)
memberdef.name: ck_model_forward

detaileddescription.para: Forward pass (prefill) - process multiple tokens. Used for initial prompt processing.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_free

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_get_base

detaileddescription.para: Get model base pointer (for weight loading).

memberdef.argsstring: (void)
memberdef.name: ck_model_get_config

detaileddescription.para: Get model configuration (dimensions, sizes, etc.) This is available before allocation.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_get_logits

detaileddescription.para: Get pointer to output logits buffer. Size is vocab_size floats.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_get_total_bytes

detaileddescription.para: Get total model size in bytes.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_precompute_rope

detaileddescription.para: Precompute RoPE cos/sin caches. Call once after allocation, before inference.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *model)
memberdef.name: ck_model_verify_canaries

detaileddescription.para: Verify memory canaries (debug). Returns number of corrupted canaries (0 = OK).
